title: Residual nuclei from reactions of relativistic ions C-12 and F-19 with Bi-209 nuclei

C-12 and F-19 with Bi-209 nuclei

x4freetext: Bi-209, thickness up to 1.9 g/cm2, was used.

from `MONIT-REF` data. The authors assumed a hypothesis
that cross sections for C-12,O-16,F-19, Ar-40 can be
